general.title: Visualize Ripley L [SPAC][DMAP]
general.instructions: Plot the Ripley L function for two phenotypes, multiple radii, regions, and simulations.\ Please refer to DUET Documentation, GitHub Documentation for further information.

parameters.name: Center Phenotype
parameters.description: The phenotype of the anchor cells.

parameters.name: Neighbor Phenotype
parameters.description: The phenotype of the neighbors cells.

parameters.name: Plot Specific Regions
parameters.description: Set to True to plot Ripley L for specific regions of interest. If True, set the two parameters "Regions Annotation"  and "Regions Labels(s)"

parameters.name: Regions Label(s)
parameters.description: The label(s) of the region(s) to plot.

parameters.name: Plot Simulations
parameters.description: Plot the 95% confidence interval for the poisson point process simulations.
